# rivalDrop

rivalDrop sells 48-hour Shopify competitor teardown reports.

## Core offer

The buyer sends:

- their public store URL
- 2, 4, or 6 competitor store URLs or brand names
- an optional focus area such as pricing, SEO, product gaps, restocks, or bundles

rivalDrop returns a finished PDF brief. The report uses public storefront data only and includes practical notes on pricing gaps, catalog gaps, bestseller signals, stock-out or restock clues, SEO gaps on higher packages, and source notes.

## Packages

- Recon: $49 one-time report, 2 competitors.
- Field Report: $99 one-time report, 4 competitors, SEO gap list, stock-out/restock snapshot.
- War Room: $149 one-time report, 6 competitors, plus one 30-day follow-up addendum.

The Field Report is the default public offer.

## Important pages

- Home: https://rivaldrop.com/
- Sample PDF: https://rivaldrop.com/RivalDrop_sample_report.pdf
- Privacy: https://rivaldrop.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://rivaldrop.com/terms.html

## Boundaries

- Public data only.
- No Shopify admin access.
- No passwords, private admin links, or customer data.
- Non-Shopify competitors can be reviewed, but data may be lighter.
- The brief gives evidence and suggested moves, not financial, legal, or professional advice.

## Purchase path

Orders are currently handled through the published Fiverr gig for the botlarry14 account.

Last updated: 2026-06-15
